name: PT apxUSD 18JUN2026
redeem: Pendle PT represents the principal portion of apxUSD and is designed to redeem at maturity, 18 Jun 2026, for the accounting asset, apxUSD. Before maturity, exit depends on secondary-market liquidity/pricing. After maturity, holders still receive apxUSD, whose issuer redemption path is limited to eligible whitelisted participants while general users rely on market liquidity.
notes: Fixed-maturity Pendle principal token over apxUSD. Adds Pendle PT smart-contract/maturity mechanics on top of apxUSD, which is backed by offchain DAT preferred shares and has permissioned direct redemption.
